node.text: John doubts if he is making a difference sometimes.
John's trophy symbolizes the obstacles he overcame on his journey to the promotion.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "attended music event") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.59)

node.text: John feels it is an uphill battle to make a positive change in communities.
John values the lessons that Max taught them about love and loyalty, and wants his kids to learn the same.
